parameters.url: ={{ 'https://' + $env.SANITY_PROJECT_ID + '.api.sanity.io/v' + ($env.SANITY_API_VERSION || '2025-01-01') + '/data/query/' + ($env.SANITY_DATASET || 'production') + '?query=' + encodeURIComponent('*[_type==\"article\" && siteSlug==\"' + ($json.siteSlug || $env.SITE_SLUG || 'hammer-hearth') + '\" && status==\"draft\" && defined(coverImage)]|order(_updatedAt asc)[0...' + Number($env.QA_BATCH_SIZE || 100) + ']') }}
